channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ntuzuma suspect killed after disarming officers and taking hostages in police cells
item.description: A 22-year-old man facing attempted murder charges was killed following a tense hostage incident at the Ntuzuma police station in eThekwini on Monday. According to police spokesperson Col Robert Netshi...

item.title: NSC Declares All Athletes Training Grants Will Be Paid in Naira
item.description: The National Sports Commission (NSC) don announce say from now on, all training grants for athletes go dey paid in Naira, no be foreign currency again. This decision follow sprinter Kayinsola Ajayi we...

item.title: Manila Mayor Offers Reward and Protection for Surrender of Escort Killer’s Accomplice
item.description: Manila Mayor Isko Moreno has announced a reward of P500,000 and witness protection for the accomplice of the gunman who killed his former security escort, George Capistrano, in Tondo last Sunday. More...

item.title: Anitha Edward Builds Successful Juice Business After Leaving White-Collar Career
item.description: Anitha Edward, 26, chose to leave a conventional office career to start her own juice business, showing that young Tanzanians can take bold steps to achieve financial independence. While studying Soci...

item.title: Lassa Fever Deaths Reach 109 in Nigeria, Bauchi and Ondo States Most Affected
item.description: The Lassa fever outbreak for 2026 don worsen for Nigeria, as NCDC report say death toll don jump from 99 to 109 in just one week. Bauchi and Ondo states dey top the list of confirmed cases, but other ...

item.title: Practical Strategies for Introverts to Succeed Professionally
item.description: Networking is often portrayed as an extrovert’s domain, with crowded rooms, quick conversations and confident handshakes. However, this view overlooks the strengths that introverts naturally bring to ...

item.title: Nairobi City Authorities Urge Riverbank Residents to Relocate Following Fatal Building Collapse in Shauri Moyo
item.description: Nairobi City County has urged residents living along riverbanks and riparian zones to take immediate precautions and consider relocating voluntarily, following a tragic building collapse at Blue Estat...

item.title: Melbourne Developer Granted Bail Following $20 Million Extortion Allegations
item.description: Paul Fridman, a 50-year-old head of a major Melbourne property development company, has been granted bail after being charged with offences connected to an alleged $20 million extortion plot. Court do...

item.title: Australian media’s inconsistent coverage of Iranian women’s soccer team highlights bias in asylum reporting
item.description: The article examines the inconsistent and often hypocritical response of Australian media to asylum seekers, focusing on the case of the Iranian women’s soccer team. Bernard Keane compares this to pas...

item.title: Supreme Court Grants 12 Weeks Maternity Leave to All Adoptive Mothers Irrespective of Child’s Age
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Tuesday declared as unconstitutional the provision in the Code on Social Security, 2020, that limited maternity leave for adoptive mothers to children under three months ...

item.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch Delivers 25 Starlink Satellites from Vandenberg
item.description: On Monday night, SpaceX successfully launched a Falcon 9 rocket carrying 25 Starlink satellites from Vandenberg Space Force Base at 10:16 p.m. The booster used in this mission had previously flown 13 ...

item.title: NDA's Efforts to Connect with Vijay's TVK Face Hurdles Amid Rajinikanth's Influence in Tamil Nadu Elections
item.description: In the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, the NDA's attempts to gain support from popular actor Vijay's political front, the 'Vijay TVK', have encountered unexpected difficulties. The primary rea...

item.title: South African Boxer Baleni and Trainer Jack Return Home Following Travel Disruptions in Asia
item.description: South African boxer Siphamandla Baleni and his trainer Khangelani Jack have safely returned home to KuGompo City after being stranded in Asia for over a week due to disruptions in commercial flights c...

item.title: Champlain Hudson Power Express Will Deliver Canadian Hydropower to New York City Homes
item.description: The Champlain Hudson Power Express, a $6 billion, 339-mile underground and underwater transmission line, is set to bring hydropower from Hydro-Quebec in Canada to New York City. Once operational, the ...

item.title: Afghanistan reports hospital hit in alleged airstrike causing hundreds of deaths
item.description: Afghan authorities have reported that a hospital was struck by an airstrike, allegedly carried out by Pakistan, resulting in at least 400 fatalities. The incident has drawn international concern due t...

item.title: Corporate Olympics to Promote Teamwork, Fitness, and Innovation in Nigerian Workplaces
item.description: Na big event dey come for Lagos wey go join business, wellness, and competitive spirit for one place. The Corporate Olympics go happen for Landmark Event Centre and e go gather professionals from top ...

item.title: Today’s Iftar and Tomorrow’s Sehri Timings Across Pakistan
item.description: Dawn has published the daily Iftar and Sehri timings for the 27th and 28th days of Ramazan for the main cities of Pakistan. According to the report, Islamabad's Fiqh-i-Hanafia followers will break the...

item.title: EU imposes sanctions on Chinese and Iranian companies for cyber attacks on member states
item.description: The European Union has officially imposed sanctions against two Chinese companies and one Iranian company due to their involvement in cyber attacks targeting EU member states. China-based Integrity Te...

item.title: Tanzania Adds Value to Minerals and Boosts Youth Employment in Mining Sector
item.description: Tanzania's mining sector is seeing solid results from reforms and expansion of local refineries, with minerals processed locally now valued at 5.802 trillion shillings. According to the Mining Commiss...

item.title: Gas Prices in Vancouver Reach Over $2 Per Litre Amid Global Supply Issues
item.description: Gas prices in Vancouver have exceeded $2 per litre, a figure much higher than the national average of approximately $1.64 per litre, according to the Canadian Automobile Association. Across British Co...
